Breaking

"Full-stack engineer ships 20+ production systems in days, not months — 5× hackathon winner, zero setup cost, maximum impact."

New York, NY — Special Report

Full-Stack AI Engineer Arrives in New York to Ship Production Systems at Unprecedented Velocity

By SHREERAM SANKAR · NYC, 2026

Shreeram Sankar is a full-stack software engineer and AI builder currently pursuing his M.S. in Computer Science at NYU Tandon School of Engineering, backed by a B.E. from Anna University and 2+ years of production experience across New York and Chennai.

His toolkit spans Python, GCP, React, Vertex AI, OpenAI and Gemini APIs, LLM agents, RAG systems, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native architectures. He has shipped autonomous AI agents, scalable REST APIs, ETL pipelines, and LLM-integrated platforms — consistently delivering in days, not months.

A 5× hackathon winner, Sankar is equally comfortable in ambiguous early-stage problems and production-grade systems requiring robustness, monitoring, and reliability. His recent roles span financial-tech CRM systems (WOW Payments) and distributed ML/ETL infrastructure for ESG analytics (Virtusa).

Work Experience
May – Aug 2025

Software Engineering Intern (Data & Backend)

WOW Payments · New York, USA

AI & ML Engineering Intern

Virtusa · Chennai, India

Re-architected ETL pipelines scaling ingestion from 35% to 96%. Built NLP systems for ESG sentiment analysis across 300+ companies in distributed GCP environment.

Get in Touch
Direct Line

Got a Story Worth Building?

The Chronicle is always looking for stories worth shipping. Whether you need an autonomous agent in a week, a production ETL redesigned overnight, or a full-stack application completed before your competitor, this desk picks up every assignment.

Open to full-time roles, consulting engagements, and collaborations that push the boundaries of what's possible with modern AI, cloud infrastructure, and rapid iteration.
